architectural_reasoning: Separate client interactivity of MDX heading copy-links into a client component HeadingWithAnchor.tsx to prevent Next.js RSC compilation restrictions on the mdxComponents dictionary in mdx-components.tsx. Integrate MobileTOC under distraction-free mode inside ArticleLayout and ProjectLayout, setting its breakpoint to lg:hidden to match the desktop TOC rail.
errors_encountered: Next.js RSC Bundler Error: mdxComponents wrapper could not be serialized when marked as client component.
MDX Compile Error: LaTeX braces inside markdown table interpreted as JSX expressions in fourier-transform-derivation.mdx.

architectural_reasoning: Replaced the IntersectionObserver scroll-spy TOC highlighting with a bounding-box and scroll-position checking function to prevent missed ticks on fast scroll and scrolling backward through tall sections. Cleaned the markdown content by removing code blocks inside extractTOC to prevent Python comments from appearing as headings. Rebranded the author across the website to Manoj Amavasya.
errors_encountered: Regex parser for TOC matched '#' characters inside markdown code blocks.
